target_0.brief_supporting_logic: The target is a military vehicle with catastrophic structural damage; its body is completely mangled, roof is torn off, and all major components are unrecognizable and fused together, consistent with a K-kill.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely burnt out with no intact major components; chassis and body are melted and fragmented; consistent with catastrophic K-kill damage.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely burnt; structural frame is collapsed; engine compartment and interior are non-functional; no intact components visible; consistent with catastrophic K-kill damage.

summary: Three military vehicles are assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence: one with catastrophic structural damage and fused components, one completely burnt out with melted chassis, and one with collapsed frame and non-functional interior. The scene depicts a road in a mountainous area littered with the wreckage of these vehicles, with soldiers in uniform standing nearby. The functional impact is likely severe, as all assessed targets are rendered completely inoperable and non-functional.
